name: Sierra Turkey Club
description: Turkey, bacon, avocado, romaine, tomato, and pepper aioli.

name: Truckee Italian
description: Ham, salami, capicola, provolone, pepper relish, lettuce, tomato, and oregano vinaigrette.

description: Roast beef, cheddar, horseradish cream, onion, arugula, and toasted roll.

description: Chicken, vegetables, wild rice, thyme, and deli broth.

description: Romaine, cucumber, tomato, chickpeas, provolone, salami, olives, and red wine vinaigrette.

name: Deli Pasta Salad Pint
description: Rotini, roasted peppers, mozzarella pearls, olives, parsley, and house Italian dressing.

name: House Iced Tea
description: Unsweetened black tea, peach tea, or lemonade tea.

description: Sea salt, jalapeno, barbecue, or vinegar.

name: House Cookie Box
description: Six rotating bakery cookies packed to go.
